summary: End-to-end testing for Boost Growth Staff Portal v2 — all 22 backend pytest tests pass (100%); frontend critical flows all verified including English UI, admin/therapist login, schedule per-therapist blocks (15 blocks × 5 day rows × 10 time columns = 750 cells), cell modal, right-click context menu with mark options, top navigation with 9 links, requests admin/therapist gating.

issues: Two harmless 401 console errors on initial /api/auth/me call before authenticated (expected behavior - me() endpoint requires auth, FE could suppress logging)

action_items: Update /app/memory/test_credentials.md — currently lists outdated Arabic therapist names with PINs 1234/5678; new seed has 15 English therapists all with PIN=0000 (Ms. Maha, Ms. Fahda, Ms. Razan, Ms. Manal, Ms. Hajer, Ms. Rahaf, Ms. Shatha, Ms. Alhanouf, Ms. Waad, Ms. Bodoor, Ms. Fatimah, Ms. Shrooq, Ms. Abeer, Ms. Najla, Ms. Walaa)
Optional: suppress the initial /api/auth/me 401 console noise on Login page (check token before calling, or swallow 401)
critical_code_review_comments: CORS uses allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=True — this is a security anti-pattern (browsers ignore credentials when origin is *). For production, switch to explicit CORS_ORIGINS list.
Auth cookie set with secure=True, samesite='none' — fine for HTTPS preview but will fail on plain http. Token is also returned in body so frontend works either way.
Brute-force lockout NOT implemented (auth playbook recommends 5-fail lockout) — minor.
Schedule.jsx is a single large file (>290 lines) — fine for now but consider splitting cell-modal/context-menu into subcomponents if it grows.
Admin user is re-seeded if password mismatch — good idempotency. Therapists re-seed only when count != 15 — could overwrite existing custom therapists if admin adds more later (acceptable for v2).
test_credentials: Admin: admin@boost-growthsa.com / BoostAdmin@2026 ; All 15 therapists PIN=0000
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds 1 admin + 15 therapists (PIN=0000) + 21 clients on startup. Verified all counts in tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py — covers auth (admin+therapist PIN), schedule CRUD with new fields (service_code, state, custom_time, week_start), cancel state notifications (Therapist Cancellation / Client Cancellation), duplicate cell, therapist filtering, requests with timeline + reward fields, status update appends timeline + notifies therapist, sheets upload/download, directory + intake + therapists CRUD, notifications. Frontend verified: English LTR layout, 9 nav links (Home/Schedule/Attendance/Clients/Intake/Requests/Directory/Resources/Admin), 15 therapist blocks each with 5×10 grid, cell modal w/ service code chips + child datalist, right-click context menu (Edit, Duplicate, Mark Client Cancel/Therapist Cancel/Normal, Notify Therapist, Delete). Admin doesn't see 'New Request' button (correct), therapist does. Hero shows 'Hello, Admin'.
rca of the issue: No production bugs identified. Two minor test-script timing issues observed (modal Escape doesn't close cell modal; PIN buttons not always immediately ready after therapist-select) — both cosmetic test concerns, not app bugs. UI requires explicit click on Save/Cancel button to close modals (good UX behavior to prevent accidental dismissal).
